rationale: Scope/honest-boundaries lens, scoping 111's OWN contribution via the three-dot diff (origin/main...4e8a1f45), not the merged 110/112 code. All six declared boundaries hold: (1) internal/panel/gate.go and internal/complete/ have ZERO diff from 111 — PanelGateDecision and `mindspec complete` are untouched. (2) The workflow does no tally-consolidation and is no decision authority: ALLOWED_CLI is exactly the four contract verbs (panel create/verify/tally + codex exec, read-only-sandboxed), `mindspec complete` appears nowhere in ms-panel.js, and no consolidation code exists (comments at L512-513 affirm it never consolidates / never authors consolidated-round / never mutates panel.json beyond create). (3) internal/panel and internal/config both zero diff — the leaf stays config-free (runner-dispatch reads config via the skill, not the package). (4) `runner:` default stays claude-code-skills, explicitly labelled 'the default until the workflow path is proven' with the skills-path retained unchanged and gated, not deleted. (5) No loop:/models: enforcement added anywhere in the code+docs diff. (6) No non-Claude-Code runner implemented — `external` is a documented out-of-scope stub deferring to ADR-0040 degraded modes; no external adapter code. internal/setup/claude.go is pure install plumbing (no decision/complete/tally logic). The spec's 'deliberately stops at' boundary paragraph is honored end to end.
findings: gate.go + internal/complete/ + internal/panel/ + internal/config/ all have zero diff in origin/main...4e8a1f45 — decision home and config-free leaf provably untouched by 111.

ALLOWED_CLI is a static 4-entry literal (panel create/verify/tally, codex exec --sandbox read-only); `mindspec complete` and all lifecycle-mutating verbs are absent from the entire file. No consolidation authored.
ms-panel-run/SKILL.md keeps claude-code-skills as the labelled default; superseded skills-path sections are gated behind the runner branch, not deleted. `external` is a stub with no shipped adapter.
No loop:/models: enforcement introduced; internal/setup/claude.go change is workflow-install plumbing only.
